ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Available quantity in stock */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number or SKU of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "seo_keywords" TEXT /* SEO keywords for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last restocked */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking (in days) */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "is_backordered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is backordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product comparison */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comparison */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made by the user during the comparison */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison */,
  "comparison_result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comparison was shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_comparisons_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review text */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
